title: Goated with a sauce
description: re-adds the copper horns from bedrock preview, and adds more features for Goat horns
body:
TEXTURES AND SOUNDS ARE NOT MINE.

Goated with a sauce, or GWAS for short, adds a bunch of feature for the Goat horns and Copper Horns!

## Current Features
GWAS adds : 
- Two new instrument for the original goat horn, fly from regular goats and resist from screaming goats
  
- all 10 copper horns from bedrock preview with crafts, the copper horn makes the harmony when looking up, the melody when looking straight, and the bass when crouching
  
- Horns can now be used in dispenser to play the sound. To make the different sounds of the copper horn, simply change the direction of the dispenser. Additionally, a note block can be placed in front of the dispenser to adjust the pitch of the sound
  
- a variant for the the copper horn called Symphonic that plays the harmony, melody and bass at the same time. Crafted by placing a copper ingot atop a copper horn

### This mod is heavily inspired by [the video from _Eight Sided Square_](https://youtu.be/g_z5CMoVnqo)

# FAQ

**A: No.**
